description: A visual agent team designer — pick an architecture pattern, define agents with roles and capabilities, see them rendered as an interactive node graph, and export the config as Markdown, AGENTS.md, or JSON
features: 6 architectural patterns (Pipeline, Fan-out/Fan-in, Expert Pool, Producer-Reviewer, Supervisor, Hierarchical)
Interactive node graph with drag-and-drop agent positioning
Custom agent nodes showing name, role, emoji, capabilities
Animated connection edges with data flow labels
Agent editor panel — edit name, role, emoji, color, capabilities
Add/remove agents and drag to create new connections
3 export formats: Markdown summary, AGENTS.md (full agent roster), JSON
Copy to clipboard and download file
4 example teams including Daniel's agent household and Nightly MVP Builder pipeline
